branding.tagline: Adoption, usage, quality, agent, and value dashboards for Gemini Enterprise, built on the BigQuery tables produced by the Gemini analytics pipeline.

gemini_project.label: BigQuery Project ID
gemini_project.description: GCP project that holds the gemini_analytics dataset (your data lake project).

gemini_dataset.label: Gemini analytics dataset
gemini_dataset.description: BigQuery dataset that holds export_history. Leave as gemini_analytics unless you renamed it.

workspace_dataset.label: Workspace audit dataset (optional)
workspace_dataset.description: BigQuery dataset holding the Workspace Gemini audit log export. Leave as workspace_audit if you are not using Workspace reporting.
